Golden test audio (golden_gunshot.wav) comes from Wikimedia Commons file:
  Gunshots 8.ogg
  Page: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Gunshots_8.ogg
  Direct: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/ee/Gunshots_8.ogg

Rights: Released into the public domain by its author (aradlaw / PDSounds).
Described by Commons as simulated gunshots (Audacity / balloon pops) recorded for LibriVox.

We redistribute a short mono 48 kHz WAV slice (~3.5 s) built with ffmpeg /
imageio-ffmpeg for pytest regression coverage (see scripts/build_real_golden_wav.py).
